label_verbatim: FIRST: Constituent Organizations — row 1 (Name | Form of organization | Jurisdiction)
rationale: Single combined recital widget for party 1 — form has a 3-column header (Name | Form of organization | Jurisdiction) but only one underlined blank per row. Same recital pattern as CORP_MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: FIRST: Constituent Organizations — row 2
FIRST: Constituent Organizations — row 3
FIRST: Constituent Organizations — row 4
rationale: Party 4 recital (form has 4 inline rows; >4 parties go on the additional-parties exhibit).

label_verbatim: FIRST: Name, form, and jurisdiction of additional constituent organizations are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Boolean opt-in for additional-parties exhibit. Same key as CORP_MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: FIRST: …attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for additional parties. Same key as CORP_MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: SECOND: Name of surviving organization
rationale: Surviving entity name (LP_MLPA-10 has 3 separate widgets for SECOND, unlike CORP_MBCA-10's combined name_and_jurisdiction).

label_verbatim: SECOND: Form of surviving organization
rationale: Surviving entity's legal form (LP, LLC, Corp, etc.).

label_verbatim: SECOND: Jurisdiction of governing statute
rationale: Jurisdiction of the surviving entity's governing statute.

label_verbatim: THIRD: Check only if applicable — The surviving organization was created as a result of the merger.
rationale: Optional boolean — set when survivor is a new entity created by the merger (parallel to FIFTH first option but expressed as a standalone declaration on page 0).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Date the merger is effective under the governing statute of the surviving organization
rationale: Effective date of the merger under the governing statute. Distinct from CORP_MBCA-10's `merger.future_effective_date` (which is optional 'if other than date of filing'); §1438 phrases this as the actual effective date.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The surviving organization is created by this merger. The organizational document that creates this surviving organization is attached.
FIFTH: The surviving organization existed before the merger. (Check only one box below)
rationale: FIFTH option 2: 'preexisted'. When selected, requires sub-option Check Box23 or Check Box24.

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 2 sub-option: Amendments provided for in the plan of merger to the organizational document that created the surviving organization are attached, included or attached, or not attached…
rationale: FIFTH-option-2 sub-option a: 'amendments_attached'. Only meaningful when fifth_election='preexisted'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 2 sub-option: The organizational documents remain unchanged.
SEVENTH: (Foreign Surviving Organization Only) … the street and mailing address of an office … (line 1 — physical)
rationale: Physical street address for service of process when survivor is foreign (§1438 mirrors §1106 SOS-as-agent appointment).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: … (line 2 — mailing address)
rationale: Mailing address for service of process when survivor is foreign. Same key as CORP_MBCA-10.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: Additional information required by the governing statute of any constituent organization is set forth in the attached Exhibit ___
rationale: Exhibit letter for additional information required by any constituent's governing statute.

label_verbatim: Must be completed by the First Constituent Organization to the Merger — (Name and form of participating constituent organization)
rationale: Party 1 signature-block head: combined name + form/type. Same key family as CORP_MBCA-10 (using `name_and_type` for cross-form consistency despite the form's 'form' wording).

label_verbatim: First Constituent: (Date)
First Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
rationale: Party 1 first authorized signer (printed name + capacity).

label_verbatim: First Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 2
rationale: Party 1 second authorized signer. §1438 footnote requires all GPs of a preexisting LP to sign — this slot covers a 2nd GP; >2 GPs go on copied overflow pages.

label_verbatim: Must be completed by the Second Constituent Organization to the Merger — (Name and form)
Second Constituent: (Date)
Second Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
Second Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 2
Must be completed by the Third Constituent Organization to the Merger — (Name and form)
Third Constituent: (Date)
Third Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
Third Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 2
Must be completed by the Fourth Constituent Organization to the Merger — (Name and form)
Fourth Constituent: (Date)
Fourth Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
Fourth Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 2

rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (merger filings often involve multiple entities — both entity slots may be populated, e.g., survivor + a non-survivor party).
